response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, with a strong background in Linux/Unix environments and architecture design. However, his language proficiency in German is only at a basic level (not meeting the required C1), and his recent roles focus heavily on full-stack engineering rather than high-level IT consulting or executive leadership. His lack of explicit UML expertise and limited project management experience also raises concerns for a Head of Development / Tech Lead role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development, architecture, and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong background in Linux/Unix environments and modern tech stacks (Node.js, Python, DLang, etc.).
Proven leadership in mentoring teams and contributing to technical communities (e.g., workshops, talks).
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level, falling short of the required C1 minimum.
Limited explicit experience in IT consulting, strategic leadership, or project management for client-facing roles.
Lack of clear UML expertise or formal architecture design experience for complex IT systems.
